subject: Query CmHandles using CPS path
commit_message:
Query CmHandles using CPS path

Added withCpsPath condition parameter
Validated to prevent misuse and blocking of querying using private properties
Updated OpenAPI with examples and links to documentation
Moved methods related to cmHandle querying using cps path from InventoryPersistence to CmHandleQueries
Renamed private method deleteSchemaSetAndListElementByCmHandleId to deleteCmHandleByCmHandleId

Issue-ID: CPS-977
Change-Id: I83827215b7e58de74f8f62cd0140516d217d93f1
Signed-off-by: lukegleeson <luke.gleeson@est.tech>

Patch Set 6:

> Patch Set 6: Code-Review-1
> 
> (1 comment)
> 
> Noticed an issue that all cm handles are returned if you use the following request body similar to this one, as if the request body is empty.
> 
> {
>   "publicCmHandleProperties": [
>     {
>       "Book": "Harry Potter",
>       "Author": "JK Rowling"    }
>   ]
> }

Might get teams opinion on this as I am struggling to implement validation for it, the json parser reads this as an empty list and as such returns all of the cmhandles, I am inclined to say it is an edge case that we can ensure will be avoided with good documentation. Otherwise I will have to completely change the structure of the openapi input object to validate the "cmHandleQueryParameters" is in the request body. This issue also currently exists in cps, it is not added by my code. Opinions from team are appreciated :)

Patch Set 6:

> 
> Might get teams opinion on this as I am struggling to implement validation for it, the json parser reads this as an empty list and as such returns all of the cmhandles, I am inclined to say it is an edge case that we can ensure will be avoided with good documentation. Otherwise I will have to completely change the structure of the openapi input object to validate the "cmHandleQueryParameters" is in the request body. This issue also currently exists in cps, it is not added by my code. Opinions from team are appreciated :)

I think adding to the RTD as a known limitation might be good enough for now :)

Patch Set 7:

Encountered a bug in the cmhandles id-searches endpoint that if no body is supplied it returns an anchor instead of all the cmhandles. Checked master as well and the bug already exists before this commit. Since this commit is so big already I will make a bug and it can be addressed separately.
